overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a snowy mountain wilderness. The scene features dense snow-covered pine forests transitioning to open valleys with frozen waterways and dramatic mountain backdrops under overcast winter skies.

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily through deep snow between tall pine trees

entered.detail: tall snow-covered evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
tall snow-covered evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
deep snow covering the forest floor with visible footprints
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense winter forest with towering snow-laden pines on both sides. The ground is covered in deep snow, and distant mountains are barely visible through the trees under an overcast sky.

events.description: emerging from dense pine forest into open mountain valley with expansive views
frozen river becomes visible and prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along snowy trail with large mountain range now dominating the right side of the view

entered.detail: partially frozen waterway with snow-covered banks running alongside the path
massive snow-covered mountain range with rocky outcrops rising prominently
snow-covered fallen tree trunk lying near the river bank

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wide mountain valley where a frozen river appears on the right. The character walks alongside the water with a massive snow-covered mountain range rising prominently on the right, while the dense forest trees fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with panoramic mountain views

events.description: character turns slightly left while crossing the frozen river area

agents.ego_description: crossing the frozen river and heading across open snow plains with panoramic mountain views in all directions

entered.detail: expansive open area covered in deep snow with minimal vegetation
snow-covered rocks scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the frozen river and enters a vast open snow field with panoramic views of the surrounding mountain ranges. The vegetation becomes sparse, and the landscape opens up to reveal snow-covered peaks in all directions under the overcast winter sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense winter forest that gradually opens into a vast, panoramic mountain wilderness. It begins with the character walking between towering, snow-laden pines under an overcast sky, where the deep snow obscures the ground and hides the distant horizon. As the trees begin to thin, the scene expands into a wide mountain valley, revealing a frozen river on the right and a massive, snow-covered range rising prominently in the distance. The camera then follows the character across the frozen waterway and into a sparse, open snow field, where the surrounding forest falls away completely. Finally, the landscape opens fully to reveal a panoramic view of jagged, snow-covered peaks stretching in all directions under the heavy winter sky.
